excluded.reason: Header only has dark (charcoal) variant, no light/dark toggle

extra.description: Fixed header must be constrained to container width (--max-container) when position:fixed is active, not full viewport width
Dropdown submenus must render above all other page content (z-index stacking verified visually with content scrolled behind header)
Visible gap between dropdown panel and header bar (approximately 24px on desktop)
Clicking inside the header but outside an open dropdown panel must close the dropdown
Left/Right arrow keys navigate between top-level menu items when focus is on the menubar
ArrowDown on a top-level menu button opens its submenu and focuses the first item
ArrowUp on a top-level menu button opens its submenu and focuses the last item
Left/Right arrow keys inside a submenu close it and move focus to the adjacent top-level item
Home/End keys on the menubar move focus to first/last top-level item
Escape key inside a submenu closes it and returns focus to the trigger button
Tab key while submenu is open closes the submenu and moves focus to the next focusable element
Hover bridge across the gap: mouse can travel from the trigger button to the dropdown panel without the dropdown closing
